name: Multi-turn conversation continuity test
description: Tests that Hibiscus remembers context across turns in the same session

input.message: Earlier you told me my health insurance has a room rent limit. Now tell me what this means for my next hospitalization. Also, what should I do about it?

notes: This is a context-dependency test. If the session memory (L1 Redis) is working, Hibiscus should reference the earlier context. If not, it should ask for the policy details again (acceptable fallback). Should NOT say 'I don't have any previous conversation context'.
